emails.subject: FW: Project Phoenix Status Report 08.24.01
emails.body: Chris-- The file attached below lists all the Project Phoenix deals. I believe that all GNO deals (approximately 30 of them) are covered. Let me know if you have any other questions. Thanks, Andy To: Chen, Andy

emails.subject: RE: Project Phoenix Status Report 08.24.01
emails.body: RE: Project Phoenix Status Report 08.24.01 Andy, That is 30 out of a total of 100 if I understood you correctly. Are the other 70 just the straight commodity deals? Thanks for your help on this item. Chris To: Stokley, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Project Phoenix Status Report 08.24.01
emails.body: Yes. Of the 100 on that list, 30 are GNO and 70 are commodity. I'm leaving early today and taking a few days of vacation. I'll be back on Tue. night. Have a good weekend. Andy To: Chen, Andy

emails.subject: RE: Project Phoenix Status Report 08.24.01
emails.body: Thanks again for your help To: Stokley, Chris
